title: ubus Observability Pattern
description: Correct pattern for publishing runtime state once through ubus and letting LuCI, CLI tooling, and other services consume that shared state instead of re-deriving it in multiple places.
when_to_use: Use when multiple consumers need the same live OpenWrt runtime state such as interface status, service state, or computed device information.
verification_basis: Verified against current netifd, procd, ubus, and luci source checkouts under tmp/authoring-repos on 2026-03-28; archive-backed shortlist for ubus-first state surfaces
